executive_summary_zh: 2026-03-26 的云端日报抓取成功，但模型总结阶段失败。
本次产出使用降级模板，仅保留最相关的候选来源供人工快速浏览。
最常见原因是 API quota 不足、账单问题，或临时模型调用错误。
executive_summary_en: The 2026-03-26 cloud digest collected sources successfully but failed during model summarization.
This output uses a fallback template and keeps only the most relevant candidates for quick review.
The most common causes are insufficient API quota, billing issues, or transient model errors.

items.title: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals \ Anthropic
items.summary_zh: 该候选来自 Anthropic Engineering，标题与摘要显示其与 AI coding / developer tooling 主题相关。由于本次云端运行未完成模型精排，这里保留为待人工确认的边缘项。
items.summary_en: This candidate comes from Anthropic Engineering and appears relevant to AI coding or developer tooling. The cloud run did not complete model ranking, so it is being retained as a borderline item.
items.why_it_matters_zh: 当模型调用失败时，它至少能保留今天抓到的高相关原始来源，避免整条流水线中断。
items.why_it_matters_en: When the model call fails, this preserves the strongest raw sources instead of breaking the whole pipeline.

top_items: Quantifying infrastructure noise in agentic coding evals \ Anthropic
The Future of SCIP | Sourcegraph Blog
themes_zh: 云端调度正常，但模型额度不足会让总结阶段失败。
需要把抓取与总结解耦，保证站点可持续更新。
themes_en: Cloud scheduling can succeed even when model quota fails.
Source collection and summarization should be decoupled so the site keeps updating.
implications_zh: 为生产环境准备备用模型或降级路径。
监控 API quota 和账单状态，避免整条流水线硬失败。
implications_en: Prepare a backup model or fallback path for production.
Monitor API quota and billing so the whole pipeline does not hard-fail.
